message:
Avoid sqlite_master enumeration in migration transition for FTS compat

Replace sqlite_master lookups in transition_from_meta_version() with
direct table queries. Databases containing FTS5 virtual tables can
trigger frankensqlite parse-recovery when sqlite_master is read, which
breaks the legacy-to-migration transition on otherwise-healthy cass DBs.

Direct queries against _schema_migrations, meta, and conversations
tables achieve the same existence checks without touching sqlite_master.

Add two tests verifying transition and full storage open succeed on
legacy v13 databases that contain FTS virtual tables.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
